def negative_python_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_repeated_dataframe_filter_chain():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_repeated_dataframe_filter_chain"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag repeated pandas filters over the same frame where one boolean mask can combine predicates."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
